description_long: This is a medium-sized, dark gray handbag with a minimalist and utilitarian design. The body of the bag is constructed from a matte, slightly textured material, likely leather or faux leather, giving it a sturdy yet flexible appearance. It features a single, wide shoulder strap attached at both ends with metal rings, allowing for comfortable crossbody or shoulder wear. The back side of the bag includes a horizontal zipper pocket for additional storage, while the main compartment appears to have a top opening, possibly secured by an internal closure. There are no visible decorative elements or branding, emphasizing its functional and understated style. The overall silhouette is slightly curved and soft, with a practical shape suitable for everyday urban use.
description: A dark gray, minimalist handbag with a wide shoulder strap and a back zipper pocket, made from matte leather-like material. The design is functional and understated, with no visible decorations or branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the smooth, unadorned main body and the wide opening at the top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the bag and the attachment of the strap with a metal ring.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the horizontal zipper pocket and the full length of the shoulder strap.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the strap attachment and a glimpse of the bag's interior opening.
attribute_strap_type: Single, wide, adjustable shoulder or crossbody strap attached with metal rings at both ends.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Main compartment likely features a zipper or magnetic snap closure at the top; back pocket has a visible zipper closure.
